summary: INCOMPLETE DELIVERABLE. Critical files missing: SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1 (test suite), fixtures/mixed-secrets.json, fixtures/all-ok.json, fixtures/all-expired.json. Workflow references these on lines 17, 42, 50, etc., but they don't exist—tests cannot run. Workflow has severe issues: lines 32, 48, 64, 80, 86 use confusing `$global:LASTEXITCODE = 0` pattern after script invocation that doesn't suppress errors properly; this breaks the intended error-handling flow. SecretRotationValidator.ps1 missing `Set-StrictMode -Version Latest`, uses fragile `[datetime]::Parse()` without format/locale safety, no `-ErrorAction Stop` on functions. Workflow steps 28–88 are highly repetitive (5 nearly-identical validation blocks that could factor into a composite action or template). Test harness assumes 23 tests exist (line 96) but can't be verified. No comments explaining TDD approach. This cannot pass validation—fixture files alone would take 10 minutes to create; the test suite requires full implementation.
